violations.text: An employee was observed touching ready to eat food bread and tomatoes with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Bread and tomatoes were disposed of at the time of inspection. Proper glove use reviewed with staff. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off and put out of order at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use ice machine until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Deli meat, soup, and cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the prep units, freezers, and refrigeration units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black and brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
Cold-water handle located at the three-bay sink was not in good repair. Inspector observed missing handle, and wrench was being used to turn on water. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of: 1. Refrigeration shelving (brown/black residue) 2. Freezer (frost buildup) 3. Stove (grease and other debris) 4. Fryer (grease and other debris) 5. Ice machine (dust and dirt) New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
The condensate from the coke refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2020

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2020

The coving in the ware washing area is in poor repair, coving was observed torn with an incomplete seal. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
